title: Parking Ice Cream Truck
hints: Use a deque (double-ended queue) to efficiently track the maximum in each sliding window.
Store indices in the deque instead of values to easily check if elements are outside the window.
Maintain the deque in decreasing order - remove elements from the back that are smaller than the current element.
The front of the deque always contains the index of the maximum element in the current window.
When the window slides, remove the front element if it's outside the current window range.
If B > length of array, return an array with a single element containing the maximum of the entire array.
